comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Animato) + Refrain (Moderately). Pipeline has stacked-verse garble in m24 (6L/5n) and m26 (6L/5n). Gaps at m14 (1n), m17 (5n!), m46 (1n, instrumental -- no fix). The gap at m14-m17 lost the entire first line of the refrain. m46 is instrumental in the PDF (first-ending volta fill).

11.comment: Pipeline had 'look at me now,.. I' (5L/6n). Spurious '..' Published: 'look at me now,-- I'. The '..' should be a long dash or removed; correcting punctuation.

12.comment: Pipeline had 'all right know where I'm' (5L/5n). 'all right' is cross-line contamination. Published: 'don't know where I'm' (4 syllables on 5 notes; 'at.' is in m13). Pipeline has 5n so can carry 4.

14.comment: GAP: 1 note + 2 rests, no lyrics. Refrain begins here. Published: 'I' (pickup).

15.comment: GAP: 4 notes, no lyrics. Published: 'was do-ing all'.

16.comment: GAP: 1 note + 1 rest, no lyrics. Published: 'right,'.

17.comment: GAP: 5 notes + 1 rest, no lyrics. Published: 'Noth-ing but rain-bows' (5 syllables on 5 notes). Remaining syllables 'in my sky,' were on lost notes.

24.comment: STACKED 6L/5n. Pipeline had 'Life was as I sweet as'. 'I' is v2 bleed. Published v1: 'Life was as sweet as'.

26.comment: STACKED 6L/5n. Pipeline had 'Nev er no er ticed the'. Second 'er' is v2 bleed. Published v1: 'Nev-er no-ticed the'.

30.comment: Pipeline had 'now When' (2L/3n). Missing syllable. Published: 'now When-ev-' (3 syllables on 3 notes).

36.comment: Pipeline had 'love is nt one' (4L/4n). Missing apostrophe. Published: 'love is-n't one'.

39.comment: Pipeline had 'tight, me' (2L/2n). Word order reversed. Published: 'me tight,'.

40.comment: Pipeline had 'Ting ling all through I' (5L/5n). Missing comma after 'through'. Published: 'Ting-ling all through, I'.

42.comment: Pipeline had 'right all But I'm' (4L/4n). Word order swapped. Published: 'all right But I'm'.
